name: Cheryl's Blueberry Lemon Crisp
recipeIngredient: 1 to 4 teaspoons grated fresh Lemon peel, depending on how tart you like it
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the blueberries in a large but shallow baking dish. You can vary the amount by half a cup either way without making any difference.
2. Lightly sprinkle a few pinches of flour over the blueberries to help absorb the berry juice. You can omit the flour if you want; there will be more leftover berry juice in the bottom of the pan.
3. Sprinkle the lemon peel over the berries. The tartness of fresh lemon peel balances the sweetness of the berries and topping, so use the amount that suits your personal taste.
4. Mix together the remaining ingredients for the topping. It will be easier if the butter and brown sugar are nice and soft.
5. Sprinkle the mix on top of the blueberries.
6. Bake at 275-degrees F for 25 minutes.
